title: Murmansk、Murmansk Oblast — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Murmansk、Murmansk Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Murmansk是Murmansk Oblast的一個城市，人口約290,000。The world’s largest city above the Arctic Circle, a major ice-free port and gateway to the Arctic with stunning northern lights.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
